hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ] && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q '\.go$'; then DIR=$(dirname "$FILE_PATH") && golangci-lint fmt "$DIR" && golangci-lint run --fix "$DIR"; fi

INPUT=$(cat) && COMMAND=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty') && if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then cd "$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd // "."')" && golangci-lint run ./... && go test ./... || (echo 'BLOCKED: lint or test failed. Fix before committing.' >&2; exit 2); fi
